list.name: device
list.label: Device
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "aircare", tag: "label", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor", start: -30d)

list.name: eventFilter
list.label: Event contains
list.description: Free-text filter on the Events panel (Type or Detail). Empty = show all.

targets.query:
from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "co2_fc")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label =~ /${device:regex}/ or "${device}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])
  |> group(columns: ["label"])

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "co2_fc" or r._field == "co2_uc" or r._field == "co2_fu" or r._field == "co2_uu")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label =~ /${device:regex}/ or "${device}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r._value, series: r.label + " " + (if r._field == "co2_fc" then "Filtered" else if r._field == "co2_uc" then "Uncompensated" else if r._field == "co2_fu" then "Forced" else "Unforced") }))
  |> group(columns: ["series"])

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "temp")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label =~ /${device:regex}/ or "${device}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])
  |> group(columns: ["label"])

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label =~ /${device:regex}/ or "${device}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])
  |> group(columns: ["label"])

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "pressure")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label =~ /${device:regex}/ or "${device}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label"])
  |> group(columns: ["label"])

from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "sensor")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rl1" or r._field == "rl2")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label =~ /${device:regex}/ or "${device}" == "$__all")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "label", "_field"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r._value, series: r.label + " " + (if r._field == "rl1" then "Fan" else "UV") }))
  |> group(columns: ["series"])

import "strings"
from(bucket: "aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "events")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "param")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label =~ /${device:regex}/ or "${device}" == "$__all")
  // Drop the periodic noise rows (WiFi strength + retired HEALTH heartbeat).
  |> filter(fn: (r) => not strings.hasPrefix(v: r._value, prefix: "WIFI_RSSI") and not strings.hasPrefix(v: r._value, prefix: "HEALTH|"))
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "label", "_value"])
  // Split "CATEGORY|SUB|detail" into parts (guarded for rows with <3 parts).
  |> map(fn: (r) => {
        parts = strings.split(v: r._value, t: "|")
        return {
          _time:  r._time,
          label:  r.label,
          cat:    parts[0],
          sub:    if length(arr: parts) > 1 then parts[1] else "",
          detail: if length(arr: parts) > 2 then parts[2] else ""
        }
      })
  // Map the category/sub into a friendly Type + the human-readable detail.
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        Time:    r._time,
        Device:  r.label,
        Type: if r.cat == "BOOT" then "Reboot"
              else if r.cat == "RELAY" then "Relay change"
              else if r.cat == "EXCEPTION" then "Schedule exception"
              else if r.cat == "UPDT" then "Firmware update"
              else if r.cat == "MQTT" then "MQTT"
              else if r.cat == "MQTT_SUB" then "MQTT"
              else if r.cat == "SNTP" then "Time sync"
              else if r.cat == "SETUP" then "Startup"
              else if r.cat == "REPORT" then "Status report"
              else if r.cat == "MCU" then "Reboot"
              else r.cat,
        Detail: if r.cat == "BOOT" then
                  (if r.sub == "POWERON" then "Power-on / plugged in"
                   else if r.sub == "SW" then "Software / remote reboot"
                   else if r.sub == "PANIC" then "Firmware panic"
                   else if r.sub == "WDT" or r.sub == "TASK_WDT" then "Watchdog reset"
                   else if r.sub == "BROWNOUT" then "Brownout reset"
                   else if r.sub == "DEEPSLEEP" then "Woke from deep sleep"
                   else "Boot reason: " + r.sub)
                else if r.cat == "RELAY" then
                  (if r.sub == "OVERRIDE_ON" then "Relay forced ON"
                   else if r.sub == "OVERRIDE_OFF" then "Relay forced OFF"
                   else if r.sub == "AUTO" then "Override cleared, back to schedule"
                   else r.sub)
                else if r.cat == "EXCEPTION" then
                  (if r.sub == "SET" then "Exception added: " + r.detail
                   else if r.sub == "CLEAR" then "All exceptions cleared"
                   else r.sub)
                else if r.cat == "UPDT" then
                  (if r.sub == "FORCED" then "Update check forced (MQTT)"
                   else if r.sub == "NOTFound" then "OTA check: no update"
                   else "OTA: " + r.sub)
                else if r.cat == "MQTT" then
                  (if r.sub == "CONNECTED" then "Connected to broker" else r.detail)
                else if r.cat == "MQTT_SUB" then "Subscribed to commands"
                else if r.cat == "SNTP" then "Time synced"
                else if r.cat == "SETUP" then "Setup finished"
                else if r.cat == "REPORT" then "On-demand status report"
                else if r.cat == "MCU" then r.detail
                else r.detail
      }))
  // Free-text dashboard filter (eventFilter). Empty = no filter.
  // Case-insensitive substring match on Type or Detail.
  |> filter(fn: (r) => "${eventFilter}" == "" or
        strings.containsStr(v: strings.toLower(v: r.Type),   substr: strings.toLower(v: "${eventFilter}")) or
        strings.containsStr(v: strings.toLower(v: r.Detail), substr: strings.toLower(v: "${eventFilter}")))
  |> sort(columns: ["Time"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 100)

import "strings"
from(bucket:"aircare")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "status")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "sched_mode" or r._field == "sched_ovr" or r._field == "sched_exc"
                or r._field == "exc1_from" or r._field == "exc1_to" or r._field == "exc1_state"
                or r._field == "exc2_from" or r._field == "exc2_to" or r._field == "exc2_state")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.label =~ /${device:regex}/ or "${device}" == "$__all")
  |> last()
  // sched_exc is numeric while other sched fields are strings; coerce
  // every value to string so pivot() does not hit a schema collision.
  // Guarantee a "label" column always exists (a device with no recent
  // data can yield a partition where the label column is absent, which
  // makes pivot() throw "row key column does not exist").
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _field: r._field, _value: string(v: r._value),
        label: if exists r.label then r.label else (if exists r.mac then r.mac else "unknown") }))
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["label"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
        label:      r.label,
        sched_mode: r.sched_mode,
        sched_ovr:  r.sched_ovr,
        sched_exc:  r.sched_exc,
        exc1_state: if exists r.exc1_state then r.exc1_state else "",
        exc1: if exists r.exc1_from and exists r.exc1_to then
                strings.substring(v: r.exc1_from, start: 4, end: 6) + "-" +
                strings.substring(v: r.exc1_from, start: 6, end: 8) + "->" +
                strings.substring(v: r.exc1_to, start: 4, end: 6) + "-" +
                strings.substring(v: r.exc1_to, start: 6, end: 8)
              else "",
        exc2_state: if exists r.exc2_state then r.exc2_state else "",
        exc2: if exists r.exc2_from and exists r.exc2_to then
                strings.substring(v: r.exc2_from, start: 4, end: 6) + "-" +
                strings.substring(v: r.exc2_from, start: 6, end: 8) + "->" +
                strings.substring(v: r.exc2_to, start: 4, end: 6) + "-" +
                strings.substring(v: r.exc2_to, start: 6, end: 8)
              else ""
      }))
  // Collapse the per-device groups into a single table so the
  // panel renders one row per device (label becomes a column).
  |> group()
  // Keep only the displayed columns.
  |> keep(columns: ["label", "sched_mode", "sched_ovr", "sched_exc", "exc1", "exc1_state", "exc2", "exc2_state"])
